name: Saute of Squash and Bell Peppers
recipeIngredient: 3 medium Yellow summer squash or payypan squash
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut onion into thin wedges no more than 1/4 inch wide.
2. Set aside.
3. Trim ends off yellow squash and zucchini.
4. Stand them on end and cut off peel in wide even slices. Reserve cores for another use.
5. Julienne the bell peppers.
6. Heat olive oil in a large saute pan over medium heat.
7. Saute onion for 5 minutes.
8. Add squash, zucchini, and bell peppers to the pan.
9. Increase heat to medium-high and stir-fry for 5 to 7 minutes until vegetables are crisp-tender.
10. Season with oregano, salt, and pepper.
11. Stir in lemon juice.
12. Serve hot or at room temperature. Serves 8.
Per serving: 43 cal; 1 g prot; 2 g fat; 6 g carb; 0 chol; 3 mg sod; 2 g fiber; vegan
Source: Vegetarian Times, Jan 94/MM by DEEANNE
